selections.name: Lonesome Star
selections.reason: Track specialist having won here over 4f last start. Wide draw is a slight negative but early speed should overcome it.

selections.name: Harry's Mode
selections.reason: Resuming with a solid trial under his belt. Gets a perfect inside draw to save ground.

selections.name: Zia Maria
selections.reason: Finished 4th here on debut over 6f. Dropping back to 4f could suit her early speed.

selections.name: Scartoon
selections.reason: Taking a massive class drop from a $717K Open race. Carries top weight but has the raw ability.

danger_horse.name: Harry's Mode
danger_horse.reason: Drawn perfectly and trained by an elite stable; could easily upset the top pick fresh.

selections.name: Under Arrest
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd here last start over this exact distance. Building towards a win and looks perfectly placed.

selections.name: Gratification
selections.reason: Also coming off a strong 2nd place finish over this track and distance. Consistent form makes him a major player.

selections.name: Ablesheeba
selections.reason: Finished 3rd in the same race as the top picks. Has the ability to be in the finish again.

selections.name: Blue Poles
selections.reason: Good 2nd at Bathurst last start. Gets the inside draw and should get an economical run.

danger_horse.name: Gratification
danger_horse.reason: Has placed in three of his last four starts and is knocking on the door for a win.

selections.name: Over Spray
selections.reason: Finished 4th on debut at Eagle Farm. Top stable and has trialed well leading into this return.

selections.name: Lady Milan
selections.reason: Solid 2nd at Eagle Farm last start. Gollan trained and gets the inside barrier advantage.

selections.name: Our Girl Scarlett
selections.reason: Consistent filly who was 2nd at Gold Coast recently. Overdue for a win and maps well.

selections.name: Racketeer
selections.reason: Resuming for a new yard. Trialed well and could show sharp improvement.

danger_horse.name: Lady Milan
danger_horse.reason: Elite trainer and perfect draw make her a massive threat to the top pick.

selections.name: Robrick
selections.reason: Taking a massive class drop from an $85K race. Class dominates here and gets the inside draw.

selections.name: Braveheart
selections.reason: Course and distance winner who has been racing consistently in tougher grades. Major player.

selections.name: Zoustrology
selections.reason: Won here over 5 1/2f last start. Speedy galloper who will appreciate the track bias.

selections.name: Swag
selections.reason: Honest type who placed 4th in Class 1 company last start. Keeps improving.

danger_horse.name: Braveheart
danger_horse.reason: Proven at the track and distance with excellent recent form.

selections.name: Clubhouse
selections.reason: Strong 2nd here over this distance last start. Looks overdue for a win in this grade.

selections.name: In Great Spirit
selections.reason: Solid 2nd here over 6f recently. Steps up slightly in trip but has the class to feature.

selections.name: Port River Billie
selections.reason: Ran a good 2nd here over 6f last start. Wide draw is a concern but has tactical speed.

selections.name: Summit
selections.reason: Fitter for recent runs and gets a favorable draw to sit just off the pace.

danger_horse.name: In Great Spirit
danger_horse.reason: Has been knocking on the door and only missed by a narrow margin last time out.

selections.name: Bee Exact
selections.reason: Finished 4th here over this distance last start. Gets a great inside draw to dictate terms.

selections.name: Torvecchio
selections.reason: Coming off a win at Chinchilla. Confidence is high, though the wide draw is a slight negative.

selections.name: Mister Selfie
selections.reason: Ran 4th at Kilcoy last start. Capable of showing best form in this company.

selections.name: Perri Lass
selections.reason: Finished 4th on the Polytrack last start. Returns to turf with a good barrier.

danger_horse.name: Torvecchio
danger_horse.reason: Last start winner who knows how to find the line.

selections.name: Trafalgar Square
selections.reason: Solid 4th at Gosford last start. Classy mare who can overcome the wide draw with her closing speed.

selections.name: Every Heart
selections.reason: Finished 5th at Doomben in a tougher race. Maps perfectly from barrier 4.

selections.name: Boomshanka
selections.reason: Good 3rd here over this distance last start. Inside draw gives her a massive advantage.

selections.name: Cherrabah

danger_horse.name: Every Heart

selections.name: Classique Gal

selections.name: Headstrong

selections.name: Makamae
